creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->patched

I've implemented proper memory probing stuff for the DL10019, DL10022, 
AX88790 and AX88190 chips.  I've not yet seen any DL100xx chips that 
really have 64k of RAM, but have 24k of RAM.  The AX88190 is the only 
chip that has 64k... 

# btw, if the originator has any datasheets...
